data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Designs interfaces that minimize the time it takes for users to make a decision by simplifying choices.
data.technical_spec: Limits navigation options to ensure a more direct and intuitive interaction.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Applies principles that make frequently-used interactive elements larger and easier to access.
data.technical_spec: Designs larger touch targets for playlists and play buttons for better accessibility.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: Creates visually appealing designs that enhance perceived usability despite potential functional limitations.
data.technical_spec: Uses high-quality visuals, animations, and a streamlined interface to engage users.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Designs consistent user experiences familiar to users from other music platforms.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates familiar elements such as common play controls, layout, and search functions.

data.title: Law of Common Region
data.description: Groups related items together to create a clear and intuitive layout.
data.technical_spec: Uses visual boundaries and backgrounds to segregate elements like album art and tracklists.
